---
name: doc-writer
description: "Use when creating or refining README content, usage guides, and contributor documentation aligned with repository behavior."
---

# Doc Writer Skill

## When to use
- Improve onboarding, usage, and maintenance docs.
- Add examples and clarify developer workflows.
- Keep docs synced with actual commands and files.

## Inputs expected
- Documentation goal and audience.
- Target files and scope.

## Workflow
1. Read current docs and related source.
2. Draft the smallest useful documentation change.
3. Keep terminology consistent across docs.

## Output format
- Documentation goal
- Changes made or proposed
- Files touched

## Guardrails
- Do not invent commands or behavior.
- Prefer concise, task-oriented language.
